title: FedRAMP Security Decision Record (SDR-CSO-FRR)
description: JSON Schema for Cloud Service Provider (CSP) system submission for FedRAMP certification per SDR-CSO-FRR.

portsAndProtocols.title: Ports and Protocols
portsAndProtocols.description: Ports and protocols used by the Cloud Service Offering

items.title: Port and Protocol
items.description: Port and protocol exposed by the Cloud Service Offering

serviceName.title: Service Name
serviceName.description: Name of the service exposed on this port.

portNumber.title: Port Number
portNumber.description: Port number used by the service. For services that operate on a range of ports, provide the range in the format 'start-end'.

transportProtocol.title: Transport Protocol
transportProtocol.description: Transport protocol used by the service

encryption.title: Encryption
encryption.description: Encryption method used by the service (e.g., TLS, SSL, None).

purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.description: Provide a general description of how it is used in the Cloud Service Offering (e.g., Web access, database connection).

securityControls.title: NIST 800-53 Security Controls
securityControls.description: Describe the security controls for the system.

parameterId.title: Parameter ID
parameterId.description: The parameter ID as defined in the NIST 800-53 Control Implementation Guide.

parameterValue.title: Parameter Value
parameterValue.description: The parameter value selected by the Cloud Service Provider. If the parameter is a boolean, provide 'true' or 'false'. If the parameter is a list, provide a comma-separated list of values.

controlImplementationDescription.title: Control Implementation Description
controlImplementationDescription.description: Description of the control implementation. May use Markdown for formatting.

fedRampRequirements.title: FedRAMP Requirements
fedRampRequirements.description: Describe how any applicable FedRAMP required processes are met.

frrImplementation.title: Requirement Implementation Statements
frrImplementation.description: Description of the requirement implementation. May use Markdown for formatting.

frrValidation.title: Requirement Validation Statements
frrValidation.description: Description of the requirement validation. May use Markdown for formatting.

frrAssessment.title: Requirement Assessment Statements
frrAssessment.description: Description of the requirement assessment. May use Markdown for formatting.

keySecurityIndicators.title: FedRAMP Key Security Indicators
keySecurityIndicators.description: Describe how the system meets the FedRAMP Key Security Indicators (KSI).

items.title: FedRAMP Key Security Indicator
items.description: How the Key Security Indictor objective is achieved and monitored

ksiImplementation.title: KSI Implementation Statements
ksiImplementation.description: Description of the requirement implementation. May use Markdown for formatting.

ksiValidation.title: KSI Validation Statements
ksiValidation.description: Description of the requirement validation. May use Markdown for formatting.

ksiAssessment.title: KSI Assessment Statements
ksiAssessment.description: Description of the requirement assessment. May use Markdown for formatting.

ksiTests.title: KSI Tests
ksiTests.description: List of tests used to validate the KSI implementation.

ksiEvidence.title: KSI Evidence
ksiEvidence.description: Results of the security test used to validate the KSI implementation.

evidenceLocation.title: Evidence Location
evidenceLocation.description: URI or file path to the evidence document

evidenceText.title: Evidence Content (Text)
evidenceText.description: Evidence included as plain text such as the output of a command or log.

lastUpdated.title: Last Updated
lastUpdated.description: Date when the evidence was last updated

implementationStatement.title: Implementation
implementationStatement.description: Description of how the control/requirement/ksi is implemented. May use Markdown for formatting.

validationStatement.title: Validation
validationStatement.description: Description of the how the control/requirement/ksi is validated by the CSP internally. May use Markdown for formatting.

assessmentStatement.title: Assessment
assessmentStatement.description: Description of how the control/requirement/ksi is assessed by an independent validator. May use Markdown for formatting.
